caveats.climate: Observed patterns within the five-year dataset; not proof of long-term climate change or attribution.
caveats.cooccurrence: Co-occurrence is an association and does not imply causation.
caveats.cross_border: Candidate temporal/geographic associations; not causation and not forecasts.
caveats.exposure: This score does not include population, infrastructure, poverty, health, damage, or preparedness.
caveats.rainfall: Open-Meteo gridded historical data; not an official station-record comparison.

chart_titles.multi_event_locations: Configured locations with multiple detected event types
chart_titles.top_daily_rainfall: Highest daily rainfall values in the analysed dataset
chart_titles.weather_exposure_ranking: Weather-event exposure score by configured location

determinism_note: Timestamp and HTML layout metadata may change; node and row selection rules are deterministic.

graph.caveat: Representative view of the verified historical graph. Not predictive.
graph.selection_methodology: Include every Country and Location node; select the highest-severity node for each configured location and weather-event node type (severity percentile descending, node ID ascending); select the strongest Climate Indicator per location (maximum severity percentile descending, node ID ascending); then include both real endpoints of the first relationship of every relationship type. Retain deterministic in-selection edges, prioritising one edge per relationship type before applying configured node and edge limits.

map.caveat: Historical analysis of configured locations using Open-Meteo gridded data. Not a forecast.
